title: 3D Dragon Egg Mace
description: Turns the default vanilla mace into a 3d more enhanced version.
body:
# 🐉 Dragon Egg Mace – 3D Texture Pack
Transform your mace into a mythical weapon!
Dragon Egg Mace is a Minecraft 1.21+ resource pack that replaces the default mace with a fully 3D model featuring a dragon egg core.

Perfect for fantasy-themed worlds, RPG servers, or players who just want their weapons to look epic.

## 🎨 Features
Replaces the vanilla mace with a custom 3D model

The heavy core is now a dragon egg

Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft 1.21+

## ⚙️ How to Use
Download and install the pack like any other resource pack.

Load into Minecraft and equip a mace.


## 👽 Credits
This was created for me by another creator discord: whosbacteria
